name: create_users
yaml_definition:
name: create_users # text field
method: POST # dropdown: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
path: /users/create # text field
auth: True
output: query_result

input:
  - name: required
    email: required
    password: required
    created_by: optional
    updated_by: optional

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - field: email
        rule: is_email
      - field: email
        rule: unique
        table: users
        key: email
      - field: password
        rule: min_length
        value: 8
      - field: mobile_number
        rule: max_length
        value: 10

  - type: query
    action: insert
    table: users
    data:
      name: name
      email: email
      password: password
    output: query_result

name: get_last_drawing_by_project_id
description: Get last drawing by project id
yaml_definition:
output: query_result

input:
  - project_id: required

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select_one
    table: drawings
    joins:
      - table: drawing_categories
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.drawing_category_id: drawing_categories.id

      - table: projects
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.project_id: projects.id

      - table: products
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.product_id: products.id

      - table: drawing_sizes
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.drawing_size_id: drawing_sizes.id

      - table: pgma_master
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.pgma_master_id: pgma_master.id

      - table: pg_master
        conditions:
          pgma_master.pg_master_id: pg_master.id

      - table: users
        alias: prepared_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.prepared_by: prepared_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: drawn_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.drawn_by: drawn_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: checked_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.checked_by: checked_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: approved_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.approved_by: approved_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: created_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.created_by: created_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: updated_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          drawings.updated_by: updated_by_user.id

    fields:
      - id
      - drawing_category_id
      - project_id
      - product_id
      - drawing_size_id
      - drawing_type
      - pgma_master_id
      - is_ibr
      - drawing_number
      - revision_number
      - drawing_release_date
      - description
      - prepared_by
      - drawn_by
      - checked_by
      - approved_by
      - running_serial_number
      - created_by
      - updated_by
      - created_at
      - updated_at
      - deleted_at
      - drawing_categories.drawing_category_code as drawing_category_code
      - projects.project_code as project_code
      - projects.project_name as project_name
      - products.product_code as product_code
      - drawing_sizes.drawing_size_code as drawing_size_code
      - pgma_master.ma_code as ma_code
      - pg_master.pg_code as pg_code
      - prepared_by_user.name as prepared_by_name
      - drawn_by_user.name as drawn_by_name
      - checked_by_user.name as checked_by_name
      - approved_by_user.name as approved_by_name
      - created_by_user.name as created_by_name
      - updated_by_user.name as updated_by_name

    where:
      drawings.project_id: project_id

    sort:
      - field: id
        order: desc

    paginate: false
    limit: 1

    output: query_result

name: get_applicable_pgma
yaml_definition:
output: query_result

input:
  - applicable_pgma_id: optional

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: applicable_pgma
    joins:
      - table: projects
        type: left
        conditions:
          applicable_pgma.project_id: projects.id

      - table: users
        alias: prepared_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          applicable_pgma.prepared_by: prepared_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: created_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          applicable_pgma.created_by: created_by_user.id

      - table: users
        alias: updated_by_user
        type: left
        conditions:
          applicable_pgma.updated_by: updated_by_user.id

    fields:
      - applicable_pgma.id
      - applicable_pgma.project_id
      - applicable_pgma.is_final
      - applicable_pgma.prepared_by
      - applicable_pgma.prepared_date
      - applicable_pgma.remarks
      - applicable_pgma.created_at
      - applicable_pgma.updated_at

      - projects.project_code as project_code
      - projects.project_name as project_name

      - prepared_by_user.name as prepared_by_name
      - created_by_user.name as created_by_name
      - updated_by_user.name as updated_by_name

    relations:
      - key: list
        table: applicable_pgma_list
        foreign_key: applicable_pgma_id
        local_key: id  
        joins:
          - table: pgma_master
            type: left
            conditions:
              applicable_pgma_list.pgma_master_id: pgma_master.id
          - table: pg_master
            type: left
            conditions:
              pgma_master.pg_master_id: pg_master.id
        fields:
          - id
          - pgma_master_id
          - category
          - estimated_weight
          - released_weight
          - to_be_released_weight
          - release_phase_weight
          - engineering_scope
          - erection_scope
          - supply_scope
          - pgma_master.ma_code as ma_code
          - pg_master.pg_code as pg_code

    where:
      applicable_pgma.id: applicable_pgma_id

    sort:
      - field: applicable_pgma.created_at
        order: desc

    output: query_result

name: get_rmi_v2_edit
description: Get single Raw Material Indent v2 for editing - sets is_final to false and returns full data
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - rmi_id: required

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select_one
    table: raw_material_indents
    fields:
      - id
      - indent_no
      - indent_date
      - revision_no
      - revision_date
      - customer_id
      - project_id
      - pgma_master_id
      - pgma_status
      - supply_scope
      - applicable_pgma_list_id
      - total_no_of_items
      - total_weight
      - notes
      - is_final
      - current_revision_no
      - prepared_by
      - checked_by
      - approved_by
      - created_at
      - updated_at
      - customers.customer_name as customer_name
      - customers.customer_code as customer_code
      - projects.project_name as project_name
      - projects.project_code as project_code
      - pgma_master.ma_code as ma_code
      - pgma_master.ma_description as ma_description
      - pg_master.pg_code as pg_code
      - pg_master.pg_description as pg_description
    joins:
      - table: customers
        type: left
        conditions:
          raw_material_indents.customer_id: customers.id
      - table: projects
        type: left
        conditions:
          raw_material_indents.project_id: projects.id
      - table: pgma_master
        type: left
        conditions:
          raw_material_indents.pgma_master_id: pgma_master.id
      - table: pg_master
        type: left
        conditions:
          pgma_master.pg_master_id: pg_master.id
    where:
      id: rmi_id
    relations:
      - key: groups
        table: rmi_groups
        foreign_key: raw_material_indent_id
        local_key: id
        fields:
          - id
          - group_name
          - total_weight
          - sort_order
        where:
          parent_id: null
        sort:
          - field: sort_order
            order: asc
        nested_relations:
          - key: sub_groups
            table: rmi_groups
            foreign_key: parent_id
            fields:
              - id
              - sub_group_name
              - total_weight
              - sort_order
            sort:
              - field: sort_order
                order: asc
            nested_relations:
              - key: items
                table: raw_material_indent_list
                foreign_key: rmi_group_id
                fields:
                  - id
                  - item_id
                  - att_or_cert
                  - sqm
                  - no_of_items
                  - unit_weight
                  - item_total_weight
                  - remarks
                  - revision_status
                  - size_1
                  - size_1_label
                  - size_2_label
                  - size_2
                joins:
                  - table: items
                    type: left
                    conditions:
                      raw_material_indent_list.item_id: items.id
                extra_fields:
                  - items.item_code as item_code
                  - items.name as item_name
                  - items.uom_id as item_uom
    output: query_result

  - type: set
    key: query_result.is_final
    value: false

name: create_bom_v2
description: Create BOM with flat items list - backend handles variant grouping
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - project_id: required
  - drawing_id: optional
  - pgma_master_id: optional
  - running_serial_no: optional
  - bom_number: optional
  - revision_number: optional
  - total_weight:
      type: number
      required: false
      default: 0
  - is_final:
      type: boolean
      required: false
      default: false
  - is_grouped:
      type: boolean
      required: false
      default: false
  - prepared_by: optional
  - checked_by: optional
  - approved_by: optional
  - notes: optional
  - items:
      type: list
      required: true
      list_input:
        - bom_list_type: required
        - bom_item_number: optional
        - item_id: optional
        - drawing_number_id: optional
        - item_description: optional
        - variant_number: optional
        - bom_item_qty: required
        - material_spec: optional
        - size_1: optional
        - size_2: optional
        - size_1_label: optional
        - size_2_label: optional
        - unit_weight: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - remarks: optional

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - field: project_id
        rule: exists
        table: projects
        key: id
      - field: [project_id, drawing_id]
        rule: unique_combination
        table: bill_of_materials
        key: [project_id, drawing_id]

  - type: query
    action: insert
    table: bill_of_materials
    data:
      project_id: project_id
      drawing_id: drawing_id
      pgma_master_id: pgma_master_id
      running_serial_no: running_serial_no
      bom_number: bom_number
      revision_number: revision_number
      total_weight: total_weight
      is_final: is_final
      is_grouped: is_grouped
      prepared_by: prepared_by
      checked_by: checked_by
      approved_by: approved_by
      notes: notes
    output: bom_result

  - type: transform
    operation: group_by
    source: items
    group_field: variant_number
    items_key: group_items
    output: grouped_items

  - type: foreach
    source: grouped_items
    item_var: group
    steps:
      - type: if
        condition:
          field: group.variant_number
          operator: not_empty
        then:
          - type: transform
            operation: sum
            source: group.group_items
            field: total_weight
            output: group_total_weight

          - type: query
            action: insert
            table: bom_list_variants
            data:
              bill_of_materials_id: bom_result.id
              variant_number: group.variant_number
              total_weight: group_total_weight
            output: variant_result

          - type: foreach
            source: group.group_items
            item_var: item
            steps:
              - type: query
                action: insert
                table: bom_list
                data:
                  bill_of_materials_id: bom_result.id
                  has_variant: true
                  bom_list_variant_id: variant_result.id
                  bom_list_type: item.bom_list_type
                  bom_item_number: item.bom_item_number
                  item_id: item.item_id
                  drawing_number_id: item.drawing_number_id
                  bom_item_qty: item.bom_item_qty
                  available_quantity: item.bom_item_qty
                  material_spec: item.material_spec
                  size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                  size_2_label: item.size_2_label 
                  size_1: item.size_1
                  size_2: item.size_2
                  unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                  total_weight: item.total_weight
                  remarks: item.remarks
                  variant_display: item.variant_number
                  item_description: item.item_description
        else:
          - type: foreach
            source: group.group_items
            item_var: item
            steps:
              - type: query
                action: insert
                table: bom_list
                data:
                  bill_of_materials_id: bom_result.id
                  has_variant: false
                  bom_list_type: item.bom_list_type
                  bom_item_number: item.bom_item_number
                  item_id: item.item_id
                  drawing_number_id: item.drawing_number_id
                  bom_item_qty: item.bom_item_qty
                  available_quantity: item.bom_item_qty
                  material_spec: item.material_spec
                  size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                  size_2_label: item.size_2_label 
                  size_1: item.size_1
                  size_2: item.size_2
                  unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                  total_weight: item.total_weight
                  remarks: item.remarks
                  variant_display: item.variant_number
                  item_description: item.item_description

      - customers.customer_name as customer_name

    joins:

name: create_rmi_v2
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - indent_no: required
  - indent_date: optional
  - revision_date: optional
  - customer_id: required
  - project_id: required
  - pgma_master_id: optional
  - pgma_status: optional
  - supply_scope: optional
  - applicable_pgma_list_id: optional
  - total_no_of_items:
      type: integer
      required: false
      default: 0
  - total_weight:
      type: number
      required: false
      default: 0
  - notes: optional
  - prepared_by: optional
  - checked_by: optional
  - approved_by: optional
  - groups: required
  - is_final:
      type: boolean
      required: false
      default: false
  - running_serial_no:
      type: integer
      required: false
      default: 0

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - rule: unique
        field: indent_no
        table: raw_material_indents
        key: indent_no
      - rule: exists
        field: customer_id
        table: customers
        key: id
      - rule: exists
        field: project_id
        table: projects
        key: id

  # Insert parent RMI record
  - type: query
    action: insert
    table: raw_material_indents
    data:
      indent_no: indent_no
      indent_date: indent_date
      revision_date: revision_date
      customer_id: customer_id
      project_id: project_id
      pgma_master_id: pgma_master_id
      pgma_status: pgma_status
      supply_scope: supply_scope
      applicable_pgma_list_id: applicable_pgma_list_id
      pgma_master_id: applicable_pgma_list_id
      total_no_of_items: total_no_of_items
      total_weight: total_weight
      notes: notes
      prepared_by: prepared_by
      checked_by: checked_by
      approved_by: approved_by
      running_serial_no: running_serial_no
    output: rmi_result

  # Level 1: foreach group
  - type: foreach
    source: groups
    item_var: group
    output: groups_result
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: insert
        table: rmi_groups
        data:
          raw_material_indent_id: rmi_result.id
          group_name: group.group_name
          total_weight: group.total_weight
          sort_order: group.sort_order
        output: group_result

      # Level 2: foreach sub_group within group
      - type: foreach
        source: group.sub_groups
        item_var: sub_group
        steps:
          - type: query
            action: insert
            table: rmi_groups
            data:
              raw_material_indent_id: rmi_result.id
              parent_id: group_result.id
              sub_group_name: sub_group.sub_group_name
              total_weight: sub_group.total_weight
              sort_order: sub_group.sort_order
            output: sub_group_result

          # Level 3: foreach item within sub_group
          - type: foreach
            source: sub_group.items
            item_var: item
            steps:
              - type: query
                action: insert
                table: raw_material_indent_list
                data:
                  raw_material_indent_id: rmi_result.id
                  rmi_group_id: sub_group_result.id
                  item_id: item.item_id
                  att_or_cert: item.att_or_cert
                  sqm: item.sqm
                  no_of_items: item.no_of_items
                  unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                  item_total_weight: item.item_total_weight
                  remarks: item.remarks
                  revision_status: item.revision_status
                  size_1: item.size_1
                  size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                  size_2_label: item.size_2_label
                  size_2: item.size_2

  # Capture change on every save (creates DRAFT snapshot)
  - type: revision_action
    action: capture_change
    module_id: 21
    document_id: rmi_result.id
    change_reason: 'Document created'

  # Conditional finalize: if is_final is true, promote DRAFT to APPROVED + lock
  - type: if
    condition:
      field: is_final
      operator: is_true
    then:
      - type: revision_action
        action: finalize
        module_id: 21
        document_id: rmi_result.id
        change_reason: 'Initial finalization'

  # Capture change on every save (creates DRAFT snapshot)
  - type: revision_action

  # Conditional finalize: if is_final is true, promote DRAFT to APPROVED + lock
  - type: if

name: delete_product_manufacturing_schedule
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - pms_id: required

stack:
  # Capture pre-image (bom_item_id, quantity) before the cascade delete wipes pms_items.
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_items
    fields:
      - bom_item_id
      - quantity
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id
    output: old_pms_items

  - type: query
    action: delete
    table: product_manufacturing_schedule
    where:
      id: pms_id
    output: query_result

  # --- Delta-update bom_list.available_quantity: add back this PMS's allocations ---
  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: old_pms_items
    field: bom_item_id
    distinct: true
    output: affected_bom_item_ids

  - type: foreach
    source: affected_bom_item_ids
    item_var: bom_item_id
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: select_one
        table: bom_list
        fields:
          - id
          - available_quantity
        where:
          id: bom_item_id
        output: bom_row

      - type: transform
        operation: sum_where
        source: old_pms_items
        field: quantity
        match:
          field: bom_item_id
          equals: bom_item_id
        output: old_qty

      - type: set
        key: new_available
        expression: "{bom_row.available_quantity} + {old_qty}"

      - type: query
        action: update
        table: bom_list
        data:
          available_quantity: new_available
        where:
          id: bom_item_id

name: update_bom_v2
description: Update BOM with flat items list - replaces all items
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - bom_id: required
  - project_id: optional
  - drawing_id: optional
  - pgma_master_id: optional
  - running_serial_no: optional
  - bom_number: optional
  - revision_number: optional
  - total_weight:
      type: number
      required: false
  - is_final:
      type: boolean
      required: false
  - is_grouped:
      type: boolean
      required: false
  - prepared_by: optional
  - checked_by: optional
  - approved_by: optional
  - notes: optional
  - items:
      type: list
      required: true
      list_input:
        - id: optional                 # existing bom_list row id; absent for newly added rows
        - bom_list_type: required
        - bom_item_number: optional
        - item_id: optional
        - drawing_number_id: optional
        - variant_number: optional
        - bom_item_qty: required
        - material_spec: optional
        - size_1_label: optional
        - size_2_label: optional
        - size_1: optional
        - size_2: optional
        - unit_weight: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - remarks: optional
        - item_description: optional

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - field: [project_id, drawing_id]
        rule: unique_except_self
        table: bill_of_materials
        key: [project_id, drawing_id]
        id_field: bom_id
        id_key: id

  # 1. Update parent BOM
  - type: query
    action: update
    table: bill_of_materials
    data:
      project_id: project_id
      drawing_id: drawing_id
      pgma_master_id: pgma_master_id
      running_serial_no: running_serial_no
      bom_number: bom_number
      revision_number: revision_number
      total_weight: total_weight
      is_final: is_final
      is_grouped: is_grouped
      prepared_by: prepared_by
      checked_by: checked_by
      approved_by: approved_by
      notes: notes
    where:
      id: bom_id
    output: bom_result

  # 2. Delete bom_list rows the user removed during edit.
  #    Kept rows are upserted by id below, preserving pms_items.bom_item_id links.
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: bom_list
    fields:
      - id
    where:
      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
    output: existing_bom_list_rows

  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: existing_bom_list_rows
    field: id
    distinct: true
    output: existing_bom_list_ids

  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: items
    field: id
    distinct: true
    output: kept_bom_list_ids

  - type: transform
    operation: difference
    source: existing_bom_list_ids
    exclude: kept_bom_list_ids
    output: ids_to_delete

  - type: foreach
    source: ids_to_delete
    item_var: doomed_id
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: delete
        table: bom_list
        hard_delete: true
        where:
          id: doomed_id

  # 3. Replace variants (hard-delete + reinsert). bom_list.bom_list_variant_id
  #    is now ON DELETE SET NULL, so kept bom_list rows briefly have a null
  #    variant link, which gets re-pointed in step 5.
  - type: query
    action: delete
    table: bom_list_variants
    hard_delete: true
    where:
      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id

  # 4. Group items by variant_number
  - type: transform
    operation: group_by
    source: items
    group_field: variant_number
    items_key: group_items
    output: grouped_items

  # 5. Insert variants and upsert items (by id when present)
  - type: foreach
    source: grouped_items
    item_var: group
    steps:
      - type: if
        condition:
          field: group.variant_number
          operator: not_empty
        then:
          - type: transform
            operation: sum
            source: group.group_items
            field: total_weight
            output: group_total_weight

          - type: query
            action: insert
            table: bom_list_variants
            data:
              bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
              variant_number: group.variant_number
              total_weight: group_total_weight
            output: variant_result

          - type: foreach
            source: group.group_items
            item_var: item
            steps:
              # Kept item (has id): preserve running balance with delta on bom_item_qty
              - type: if
                condition:
                  field: item.id
                  operator: exists
                then:
                  - type: query
                    action: select
                    table: pms_items
                    fields:
                      - quantity
                    where:
                      bom_item_id: item.id
                    output: pms_allocations

                  - type: transform
                    operation: sum
                    source: pms_allocations
                    field: quantity
                    output: consumed_qty

                  - type: set
                    key: computed_avail
                    expression: "{item.bom_item_qty} - {consumed_qty}"

                  - type: if
                    condition:
                      field: computed_avail
                      operator: less_than
                      value: 0
                    then:
                      - type: error
                        message: "Cannot reduce quantity to {item.bom_item_qty} for '{item.item_description}': {consumed_qty} unit(s) are already allocated to PMS. Minimum allowed quantity is {consumed_qty}."

                  - type: query
                    action: insert
                    upsert: true
                    table: bom_list
                    data:
                      id: item.id
                      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
                      has_variant: true
                      bom_list_variant_id: variant_result.id
                      bom_list_type: item.bom_list_type
                      bom_item_number: item.bom_item_number
                      item_id: item.item_id
                      drawing_number_id: item.drawing_number_id
                      bom_item_qty: item.bom_item_qty
                      available_quantity: computed_avail
                      material_spec: item.material_spec
                      size_1: item.size_1
                      size_2: item.size_2
                      size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                      size_2_label: item.size_2_label
                      unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                      total_weight: item.total_weight
                      remarks: item.remarks
                      variant_display: item.variant_number
                      item_description: item.item_description
                else:
                  # New item (no id): start fully available
                  - type: query
                    action: insert
                    upsert: true
                    table: bom_list
                    data:
                      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
                      has_variant: true
                      bom_list_variant_id: variant_result.id
                      bom_list_type: item.bom_list_type
                      bom_item_number: item.bom_item_number
                      item_id: item.item_id
                      drawing_number_id: item.drawing_number_id
                      bom_item_qty: item.bom_item_qty
                      available_quantity: item.bom_item_qty
                      material_spec: item.material_spec
                      size_1: item.size_1
                      size_2: item.size_2
                      size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                      size_2_label: item.size_2_label
                      unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                      total_weight: item.total_weight
                      remarks: item.remarks
                      variant_display: item.variant_number
                      item_description: item.item_description
        else:
          - type: foreach
            source: group.group_items
            item_var: item
            steps:
              - type: if
                condition:
                  field: item.id
                  operator: exists
                then:
                  - type: query
                    action: select
                    table: pms_items
                    fields:
                      - quantity
                    where:
                      bom_item_id: item.id
                    output: pms_allocations

                  - type: transform
                    operation: sum
                    source: pms_allocations
                    field: quantity
                    output: consumed_qty

                  - type: set
                    key: computed_avail
                    expression: "{item.bom_item_qty} - {consumed_qty}"

                  - type: if
                    condition:
                      field: computed_avail
                      operator: less_than
                      value: 0
                    then:
                      - type: error
                        message: "Cannot reduce quantity to {item.bom_item_qty} for '{item.item_description}': {consumed_qty} unit(s) are already allocated to PMS. Minimum allowed quantity is {consumed_qty}."

                  - type: query
                    action: insert
                    upsert: true
                    table: bom_list
                    data:
                      id: item.id
                      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
                      has_variant: false
                      bom_list_variant_id: null
                      bom_list_type: item.bom_list_type
                      bom_item_number: item.bom_item_number
                      item_id: item.item_id
                      drawing_number_id: item.drawing_number_id
                      bom_item_qty: item.bom_item_qty
                      available_quantity: computed_avail
                      material_spec: item.material_spec
                      size_1_label: item.size_1_label
                      size_2_label: item.size_2_label
                      size_1: item.size_1
                      size_2: item.size_2
                      unit_weight: item.unit_weight
                      total_weight: item.total_weight
                      remarks: item.remarks
                      variant_display: item.variant_number
                      item_description: item.item_description
                else:
                  - type: query
                    action: insert
                    upsert: true
                    table: bom_list
                    data:
                      bill_of_materials_id: bom_id
                      has_variant: false
                      bom_list_variant_id: null

name: update_product_manufacturing_schedule
description: Update an existing product manufacturing schedule
yaml_definition:
output: pms_result
input:
  - pms_id:
      type: integer
      required: true
  - project_id:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - drawing_id:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - customer_id:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - pgma_master_id:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - component_description:
      type: text
      required: false
  - du_from:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - du_to:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - release_no:
      type: text
      required: false
  - product_group_status:
      type: text
      required: false
  - total_weight:
      type: decimal
      required: false
  - prepared_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - checked_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - approved_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - is_final:
      type: boolean
      required: false
      default: false
  - item_groups:
      type: list
      required: false
      list_input:
        - category: required
        - description: optional
        - drawing_id: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - dispatch_unit_no: optional
        - items: optional
  - items:
      type: list
      required: false
      list_input:
        - drawing_id: optional
        - bom_id: optional
        - bom_item_id: optional
        - item_group_id: optional
        - item_no: optional
        - bom_no: optional
        - dispatch_unit_no: optional
        - quantity: required
        - description: optional
        - material_spec: optional
        - unit_weight: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - size_1: optional
        - size_2: optional
        - remarks: optional

revision_config:
  lookup_sources:
    - foreign_key: bom_item_id
      table: bom_list
      match_column: id
      fields:
        - unit_weight
        - material_spec
    - foreign_key: drawing_id
      table: drawings
      match_column: id
      fields:
        - drawing_number
  display_tables:
    - pms_items
  columns:
    - key: item_no
      header: Item No
      width: "80"
    - key: dispatch_unit_no
      header: DU No
      width: "80"
    - key: drawing_number
      header: Drawing No
      width: "120"
    - key: description
      header: Description
      width: "180"
    - key: material_spec
      header: Material Spec
      width: "140"
    - key: quantity
      header: Qty
      width: "70"
    - key: unit_weight
      header: Unit Wt
      width: "90"
    - key: total_weight
      header: Total Wt
      width: "90"
    - key: size_1
      header: Size 1
      width: "90"
    - key: size_2
      header: Size 2
      width: "90"
    - key: remarks
      header: Remarks
      width: "150"
    - key: _changeRemarks
      header: Changes
      minWidth: "200"
    - key: _revisionNo
      header: Rev
      width: "60"
      align: center

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - field: pms_id
        rule: exists
        table: product_manufacturing_schedule
        key: id

  # Block over-allocation across all input items and nested grouped items.
  # self_* params add back THIS PMS's current allocation so an unchanged
  # re-save (or an edit that just decreases qty) never falsely fails.
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - rule: not_exceeds_available
        lists:
          - path: items
          - path: item_groups
            nested_field: items
        qty_field: quantity
        fk_field: bom_item_id
        table: bom_list
        against_column: available_quantity
        self_table: pms_items
        self_match_column: bom_item_id
        self_sum_field: quantity
        self_scope_column: pms_id
        self_scope_value: pms_id

  # Capture pre-image (bom_item_id, quantity) so the delta block downstream
  # can return this PMS's prior allocation to bom_list.available_quantity.
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_items
    fields:
      - bom_item_id
      - quantity
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id
    output: old_pms_items

  # Update parent PMS record
  - type: query
    action: update
    table: product_manufacturing_schedule
    data:
      project_id: project_id
      drawing_id: drawing_id
      customer_id: customer_id
      pgma_master_id: pgma_master_id
      component_description: component_description
      du_from: du_from
      du_to: du_to
      release_no: release_no
      product_group_status: product_group_status
      total_weight: total_weight
      prepared_by: prepared_by
      checked_by: checked_by
      approved_by: approved_by
    where:
      id: pms_id
    output: pms_result

  # Hard delete existing line items (full-replace strategy — required by revision diff)
  - type: query
    action: delete
    table: pms_items
    hard_delete: true
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id

  # Hard delete existing item groups
  - type: query
    action: delete
    table: pms_item_groups
    hard_delete: true
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id

  # Re-insert item groups and their nested items
  - type: foreach
    source: item_groups
    item_var: item_group
    output: item_groups_result
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: insert
        table: pms_item_groups
        data:
          pms_id: pms_id
          category: item_group.category
          description: item_group.description
          drawing_id: item_group.drawing_id
          total_weight: item_group.total_weight
          dispatch_unit_no: item_group.dispatch_unit_no
        output: item_group_result

      - type: foreach
        source: item_group.items
        item_var: grouped_item
        steps:
          - type: query
            action: insert
            table: pms_items
            data:
              pms_id: pms_id
              pms_item_group_id: item_group_result.id
              drawing_id: grouped_item.drawing_id
              bom_id: grouped_item.bom_id
              bom_item_id: grouped_item.bom_item_id
              item_group_id: grouped_item.item_group_id
              item_no: grouped_item.item_no
              bom_no: grouped_item.bom_no
              dispatch_unit_no: grouped_item.dispatch_unit_no
              quantity: grouped_item.quantity
              description: grouped_item.description
              material_spec: grouped_item.material_spec
              unit_weight: grouped_item.unit_weight
              total_weight: grouped_item.total_weight
              size_1: grouped_item.size_1
              size_2: grouped_item.size_2
              remarks: grouped_item.remarks

  # Re-insert standalone items (not part of any group)
  - type: foreach
    source: items
    item_var: standalone_item
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: insert
        table: pms_items
        data:
          pms_id: pms_id
          drawing_id: standalone_item.drawing_id
          bom_id: standalone_item.bom_id
          bom_item_id: standalone_item.bom_item_id
          item_group_id: standalone_item.item_group_id
          item_no: standalone_item.item_no
          bom_no: standalone_item.bom_no
          dispatch_unit_no: standalone_item.dispatch_unit_no
          quantity: standalone_item.quantity
          description: standalone_item.description
          material_spec: standalone_item.material_spec
          unit_weight: standalone_item.unit_weight
          total_weight: standalone_item.total_weight
          size_1: standalone_item.size_1
          size_2: standalone_item.size_2
          remarks: standalone_item.remarks

  # Capture change on every save (creates DRAFT snapshot)
  - type: revision_action
    action: capture_change
    module_id: 28
    document_id: pms_id
    change_reason: "Document updated"

  # Conditional finalize: if is_final is true, lock + bump current_revision_no
  - type: if
    condition:
      field: is_final
      operator: is_true
    then:
      - type: revision_action
        action: finalize
        module_id: 28
        document_id: pms_id
        change_reason: "Updated and finalized"

  # --- Delta-update bom_list.available_quantity for old ∪ new affected lines ---
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_items
    fields:
      - bom_item_id
      - quantity
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id
    output: new_pms_items

  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: old_pms_items
    field: bom_item_id
    distinct: true
    output: old_bom_item_ids

  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: new_pms_items
    field: bom_item_id
    distinct: true
    output: new_bom_item_ids

  - type: transform
    operation: concat
    sources:
      - old_bom_item_ids
      - new_bom_item_ids
    output: affected_bom_item_ids

  - type: foreach
    source: affected_bom_item_ids
    item_var: bom_item_id
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: select_one
        table: bom_list
        fields:
          - id
          - available_quantity
        where:
          id: bom_item_id
        output: bom_row

      - type: transform
        operation: sum_where
        source: old_pms_items
        field: quantity
        match:
          field: bom_item_id
          equals: bom_item_id
        output: old_qty

      - type: transform
        operation: sum_where
        source: new_pms_items
        field: quantity
        match:
          field: bom_item_id
          equals: bom_item_id
        output: new_qty

      - type: set
        key: new_available
        expression: "{bom_row.available_quantity} + {old_qty} - {new_qty}"

      - type: query
        action: update
        table: bom_list
        data:
          available_quantity: new_available
        where:
          id: bom_item_id

name: get_pms_shipping_list
description: Retrieve all product manufacturing schedule - shipping list
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:
  - pms_id: required

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select_one
    table: product_manufacturing_schedule
    fields:
      - product_manufacturing_schedule.id
      - product_manufacturing_schedule.release_no
      - product_manufacturing_schedule.du_from
      - product_manufacturing_schedule.du_to
      - projects.project_code as project_code
      - projects.project_name as project_name
      - customers.customer_code as customer_code
      - customers.customer_name as customer_name
      - pgma_master.ma_code as ma_code
      - pgma_master.ma_description as ma_description
      - pg_master.pg_code as pg_code
      - drawings.drawing_number as principal_drawing_no
    joins:
      - table: projects
        type: left
        conditions:
          product_manufacturing_schedule.project_id: projects.id
      - table: customers
        type: left
        conditions:
          product_manufacturing_schedule.customer_id: customers.id
      - table: drawings
        type: left
        conditions:
          product_manufacturing_schedule.drawing_id: drawings.id
      - table: pgma_master
        type: left
        conditions:
          product_manufacturing_schedule.pgma_master_id: pgma_master.id
      - table: pg_master
        type: left
        conditions:
          pgma_master.pg_master_id: pg_master.id
    where:
      id: pms_id
    relations:
      # Item-groups (one row per group) — used by paginator for groups-first DUs.
      - key: shipping_groups
        table: pms_item_groups
        foreign_key: pms_id
        local_key: id
        joins:
          - table: drawings
            type: left
            conditions:
              pms_item_groups.drawing_id: drawings.id
        fields:
          - pms_item_groups.id
          - pms_item_groups.dispatch_unit_no
          - pms_item_groups.description
          - pms_item_groups.category
          - pms_item_groups.total_weight
          - pms_item_groups.drawing_id
          - drawings.drawing_number as drawing_number
        sort:
          - field: pms_item_groups.dispatch_unit_no
            order: asc
          - field: pms_item_groups.id
            order: asc

      # All items — paginator picks orphan items per DU, and uses children
      # of each group to derive per-group qty + summed unit_weight.
      - key: shipping_items
        table: pms_items
        foreign_key: pms_id
        local_key: id
        joins:
          - table: drawings
            type: left
            conditions:
              pms_items.drawing_id: drawings.id
          - table: bom_list
            type: left
            conditions:
              pms_items.bom_item_id: bom_list.id
          - table: items
            type: left
            conditions:
              bom_list.item_id: items.id
        fields:
          - pms_items.id
          - pms_items.pms_item_group_id
          - pms_items.item_group_id
          - pms_items.item_no
          - pms_items.total_weight
          - pms_items.dispatch_unit_no
          - pms_items.quantity
          - pms_items.size_1
          - pms_items.size_2
          - pms_items.remarks
          - drawings.drawing_number as drawing_number
          - items.name as item_name
          - items.item_description as item_desc
          - bom_list.unit_weight as unit_weight
          - bom_list.material_spec as material_spec
        sort:
          - field: pms_items.dispatch_unit_no
            order: asc
          - field: pms_items.id
            order: asc

      # Standalone DUs — pms_items NOT part of any group. Each row is its own
      # consolidated DU (one row per dispatch_unit_no), suitable for the
      # frontend SL table alongside `shipping_groups`.
      - key: standalone_dus
        table: pms_items
        foreign_key: pms_id
        local_key: id
        joins:
          - table: drawings
            type: left
            conditions:
              pms_items.drawing_id: drawings.id
          - table: bom_list
            type: left
            conditions:
              pms_items.bom_item_id: bom_list.id
          - table: items
            type: left
            conditions:
              bom_list.item_id: items.id
        where:
          pms_item_group_id: null
        fields:
          - pms_items.id
          - pms_items.item_no
          - pms_items.item_group_id
          - pms_items.dispatch_unit_no
          - pms_items.quantity
          - pms_items.unit_weight
          - pms_items.total_weight
          - pms_items.description
          - pms_items.material_spec
          - pms_items.size_1
          - pms_items.size_2
          - pms_items.remarks
          - pms_items.drawing_id
          - drawings.drawing_number as drawing_number
          - items.name as item_name
          - items.item_description as item_desc
          - bom_list.unit_weight as bom_unit_weight
          - bom_list.material_spec as bom_material_spec
        sort:
          - field: pms_items.dispatch_unit_no
            order: asc
          - field: pms_items.id
            order: asc
    output: query_result

name: get_pms_drawing_index
yaml_definition:
output: query_result
input:

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select_one

      - pgma_master.ma_code as ma_code

      - table: drawings
        type: left
        conditions:

      - table: drawing_sizes
        alias: principal_size
        type: left

    where:

          - table: drawings
            type: inner
            conditions:
              pms_items.drawing_id: drawings.id
          - table: drawing_sizes

            conditions:

          - drawing_categories.drawing_category_code as category_code
          - pms_items.remarks as remarks
        sort:
          - field: drawings.drawing_number
            order: asc

      # Item group totals — paginator sums these for TOTAL WEIGHT IN KGS.
      - key: item_group_weights
        table: pms_item_groups
        foreign_key: pms_id
        local_key: id
        fields:
          - pms_item_groups.total_weight
    output: query_result

yaml_definition:
output: data
input:
  - pms_id: required

stack:
  # Consolidated DU rows — one record per pms_item_group (group IS the DU).
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_item_groups
    joins:
      - table: drawings
        type: left
        conditions:
          pms_item_groups.drawing_id: drawings.id
    fields:
      - pms_item_groups.dispatch_unit_no as dispatch_unit_no
      - drawings.drawing_number as group_drawing_number
      - pms_item_groups.description as group_description
      - pms_item_groups.total_weight as unit_weight
    where:

    sort:
      - field: pms_item_groups.dispatch_unit_no
        order: asc
      - field: pms_item_groups.id
        order: asc
    output: grouped_rows

  # Standalone DUs — pms_items NOT part of any group. One row per orphan DU.
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_items
    joins:
      - table: drawings
        type: left
        conditions:
          pms_items.drawing_id: drawings.id
    fields:
      - pms_items.dispatch_unit_no as dispatch_unit_no
      - drawings.drawing_number as group_drawing_number
      - pms_items.description as group_description
      - pms_items.quantity as quantity
      - pms_items.unit_weight as unit_weight
      - pms_items.remarks as remarks
    where:
      pms_id: pms_id
      pms_item_group_id: null
    sort:
      - field: pms_items.dispatch_unit_no
        order: asc
      - field: pms_items.id
        order: asc
    output: standalone_rows

  - type: transform
    operation: concat
    sources:
      - grouped_rows
      - standalone_rows
    output: data

      type: integer
      required: true
  - customer_id:
      type: integer
      required: true
  - pgma_master_id:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - component_description:
      type: text
      required: false
  - du_from:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - du_to:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - release_no:
      type: text
      required: false
  - product_group_status:
      type: text
      required: false
      default: Incomplete
  - revision_no:
      type: text
      required: false
  - revision_notes:
      type: text
      required: false
  - total_weight:
      type: decimal
      required: false
  - is_final:
      type: boolean
      required: false
      default: false
  - prepared_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - checked_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - approved_by:
      type: integer
      required: false
  - item_groups:
      type: list
      required: false
      list_input:
        - category: required
        - description: optional
        - drawing_id: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - dispatch_unit_no: optional
        - items: optional
  - items:
      type: list
      required: false
      list_input:
        - drawing_id: optional
        - bom_id: optional
        - bom_item_id: optional
        - item_group_id: optional
        - dispatch_unit_no: optional
        - item_no: optional
        - bom_no: optional
        - quantity: required
        - description: optional
        - material_spec: optional
        - unit_weight: optional
        - total_weight: optional
        - size_1: optional
        - size_2: optional
        - remarks: optional

stack:
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - field: project_id
        rule: exists
        table: projects
        key: id
      - field: drawing_id
        rule: exists
        table: drawings
        key: id
      - field: customer_id
        rule: exists
        table: customers
        key: id

  # Block over-allocation across all input items (and nested grouped items)
  # against bom_list.available_quantity. No self-contribution on create.
  - type: validate
    conditions:
      - rule: not_exceeds_available
        lists:
          - path: items
          - path: item_groups
            nested_field: items
        qty_field: quantity
        fk_field: bom_item_id
        table: bom_list
        against_column: available_quantity

  - type: query
    action: insert
    table: product_manufacturing_schedule
    data:
      project_id: project_id
      drawing_id: drawing_id
      customer_id: customer_id
      pgma_master_id: pgma_master_id
      component_description: component_description
      du_from: du_from
      du_to: du_to
      release_no: release_no
      product_group_status: product_group_status
      revision_notes: revision_notes
      total_weight: total_weight
      is_final: is_final
      prepared_by: prepared_by
      checked_by: checked_by
      approved_by: approved_by
    relations:
      - key: item_groups
        table: pms_item_groups
        foreign_key: pms_id
        nested_relations:
          - key: items
            table: pms_items
            foreign_key: pms_item_group_id
            root_foreign_key: pms_id
      - key: items
        table: pms_items
        foreign_key: pms_id
    output: pms_result

  - type: revision_action
    action: capture_change
    module_id: 28
    document_id: pms_result.id
    change_reason: "PMS created"

  - type: if
    condition:
      field: is_final
      operator: is_true
    then:
      - type: revision_action
        action: finalize
        module_id: 28
        document_id: pms_result.id
        change_reason: "PMS created and finalized"

  # --- Delta-update bom_list.available_quantity for every BOM line this PMS allocated ---
  - type: query
    action: select
    table: pms_items
    fields:
      - bom_item_id
      - quantity
    where:
      pms_id: pms_result.id
    output: new_pms_items

  - type: transform
    operation: pluck
    source: new_pms_items
    field: bom_item_id
    distinct: true
    output: affected_bom_item_ids

  - type: foreach
    source: affected_bom_item_ids
    item_var: bom_item_id
    steps:
      - type: query
        action: select_one
        table: bom_list
        fields:
          - id
          - available_quantity
        where:
          id: bom_item_id
        output: bom_row

      - type: transform
        operation: sum_where
        source: new_pms_items
        field: quantity
        match:
          field: bom_item_id
          equals: bom_item_id
        output: new_qty

      - type: set
        key: new_available
        expression: "{bom_row.available_quantity} - {new_qty}"

      - type: query
        action: update
        table: bom_list
        data:
          available_quantity: new_available
        where:
          id: bom_item_id

name: get_bom_for_export
description: Fetch full BOM data for Excel export including drawing info, variants and items
yaml_definition:
name: get_bom_for_export
output: query_result

input:
  - bom_id: required

stack:
  - type: query
    action: select_one
    table: bill_of_materials
    joins:
      - table: drawings
        type: left
        conditions:
          bill_of_materials.drawing_id: drawings.id

    fields:
      - id
      - revision_number
      - total_weight
      - is_grouped
      - is_final
      - notes
      - drawings.drawing_number as drawing_number
      - drawings.description as drawing_description

    where:
      id: bom_id

    relations:
      - key: items
        table: bom_list
        foreign_key: bill_of_materials_id
        local_key: id
        joins:
          - table: items
            type: left
            conditions:
              bom_list.item_id: items.id

          - table: material_specifications
            type: left
            conditions:
              items.material_specification_id: material_specifications.id

          - table: item_groups
            type: left
            conditions:
              items.item_group_id: item_groups.id

          - table: bom_list_variants
            type: left
            conditions:
              bom_list.bom_list_variant_id: bom_list_variants.id

          - table: drawings
            alias: bom_list_drawing
            type: left
            conditions:
              bom_list.drawing_number_id: bom_list_drawing.id

        fields:
          - bom_list.id
          - bom_list.bom_item_number
          - bom_list.has_variant
          - bom_list_drawing.drawing_number as drawing_number
          - bom_list.bom_item_qty
          - bom_list.unit_weight
          - bom_list.total_weight
          - bom_list.remarks
          - items.item_code as item_code
          - items.name as item_name
          - bom_list.item_description as bom_item_description
          - items.item_description as item_description
          - items.item_size as item_size
          - item_groups.item_group_name as item_group_name
          - material_specifications.material_specification_code as material_specification_code
          - bom_list_variants.variant_number as variant_number
          - bom_list.material_spec as material_spec
          - bom_list.size_1 as size_1
          - bom_list.size_2 as size_2
          - bom_list.size_1_label as size_1_label
          - bom_list.size_2_label as size_2_label

        sort:
          - field: bom_list.id
            order: asc

    output: query_result
